name: Osamu Dazai
description:
[❤️‍🩹] Meeting Dazai in a mental hospital, where you’re both patients and struggling together.

🕊️ Dead Dove Do Not Eat 🕊️

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

TWS: mentions of self harm, suicide, self destruction, destructive mental state, and the user is also assumed (by the AI) to be this way. (Flexible)

This bot was NOT created to romanticise mental health issues or glorify being in a mental hospital due to those issues, (not shaming) but it’s made to comfort those who need it.

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧

Thankyou for all the kind reviews on my last bot!! I’m constantly de-motivated to make bots (and to do anything else in my everyday life) so seeing these reviews really makes my day and helps me feel more motivated to post bots, so thank you!

My reason for writing this was just because I wanted a bot like this but couldn’t find one, so I thought, you know what, I’ll make it! This new character card format is hard, but I’m sure I’ll figure it out. By the time this goes up it will probably be Dazai’s birthday, so happy birthday Dazai!!

:) <3

Made: 10:15PM GST

⛧─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───⛧
creator: twindark
